response:
• **Incident Details**: Two-vehicle collision occurred at 3:45 PM on Main Street and Oak Avenue intersection when Vehicle A (2019 Honda Civic) failed to yield at a stop sign and struck Vehicle B (2021 Ford Explorer) on the passenger side.

• **Injuries and Damages**: Driver of Vehicle A sustained minor lacerations and was transported to General Hospital; Vehicle B driver reported neck pain but declined medical transport; both vehicles sustained significant damage and required towing.

• **Contributing Factors**: Clear weather conditions with dry pavement; Vehicle A driver cited for failure to yield right-of-way; no evidence of impairment or mechanical failure; traffic signal was functioning properly at time of accident.
